allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "$files = Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\criap\\OneDrive\\Documentos\\Github\\rotina-saude'' -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_Extension -eq ''.md'' -or $_Extension -eq ''.txt'' }; foreach \($f in $files\) { $kb = [math]::Round\($f.Length/1024,1\); Write-Host \(''{0} KB - {1}'' -f $kb, $f.FullName\) }")
